Yiddish Black Hand.description: Criminal organization and extortion ring operating on New York's Lower East Side in the early 20th century. Founded around 1906 by Jacob 'Johnny' Levinsky, Charles Vitoffsky, and Joseph Toblinsky. Targeted Jewish immigrant businessmen with threats and extortion, later expanding into assault, theft, and murder for hire. By 1913, they had gained a virtual monopoly in their criminal activities.

descriptions: The Yiddish Black Hand adopted the extortion method previously used by Neapolitan Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: This method had been used in New York City by Neapolitan Camorristi , Sicilian mafiosi , and other Italian immigrant criminal gangs who preyed on fellow Italian immigrants as the Black Hand .

descriptions: The Yiddish Black Hand adopted the extortion method previously used by Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: This method had been used in New York City by Neapolitan Camorristi , Sicilian mafiosi , and other Italian immigrant criminal gangs who preyed on fellow Italian immigrants as the Black Hand .

descriptions: Pápayovci cooperated with Sýkorovci.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Pápay and his group began to cooperate with Miroslav Sýkor and his group

descriptions: Aphuset MC is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: The clubhouse of the Aphuset Motorcycle Club – a Bandidos support club – was bombed on 28 April 1997.

descriptions: Ku Klux Klan Kubano is a Klan-inspired group in Cuba.
edges.evidence_quote: an organization known as the Ku Klux Klan Kubano targeted West Indian migrant workers and Afro-Cubans

descriptions: The Nashes and Billy Hill's organization had protection arrangements.
edges.evidence_quote: Further contacts – and protection arrangements – were made between other American casino owners, the Krays, the Nashes and Pyle.

descriptions: The Krays and Billy Hill's organization had protection arrangements.

Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family an.description: A federation of 12 armed groups in Haiti led by former police officer Jimmy 'Barbecue' Chérizier, founded in June 2020. It controls over 80% of Port-au-Prince and is involved in assassinations, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities. In March 2024, it orchestrated a jailbreak that led to the resignation of Prime Minister Ariel Henry.

edges.target: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies

Clan Di Cosola.description: Italian criminal organization based in Bari, operating in the Carbonara, Ceglie del Campo, and Loseto neighborhoods. Founded in the 1980s by Antonio Di Cosola, known as 'Strascinacvert', along with Francesco Biancoli, Savino Parisi, and Giuseppe Mercante. The clan was involved in murders, drug trafficking, extortion, and video poker rackets. After the death of Antonio Di Cosola and law enforcement crackdowns, the clan is considered heavily weakened.

descriptions: The Capriati clan is allied with the Di Cosola clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: The Di Cosola clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: Oude Garde is a sub-group within AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: Main groups within the AFCA hooligan firm are: - Oude Garde

descriptions: IS-BP is an offshoot of JMB.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is an offshoot of the Al-Qaeda affiliated Jamaat-ul-Mujahideen Bangladesh (JMB).

descriptions: Vieux-Doo Dawgs M.C. is a support club created by Galloping Goose.
edges.evidence_quote: He described them as a "one percenter club", which created their first support club name "Vieux-Doo Dawgs M.C." This was established in Louisiana dated 1998.

descriptions: Vieux-Doo Dawgs M.C. took over the Midwest Drifters, using them for errands and cash.
edges.evidence_quote: Once established it took over another club, the Midwest Drifters, and uses them to run errands and provide cash.

descriptions: Rockers MC founded Redliners to oppose Spartans MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The resulting one-percenter supporter club that came about was the Redliners, which Stadnick plan ned to oppose two of Western Canada's dominant biker gangs: the Los Brovos and the Spartans MC.

'Ndrina Palamara.description: The 'Ndrina Palamara is a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Africo, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Bruzzaniti and Morabito clans. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, particularly cocaine from South America via Senegal, and in the rigging of public contracts in the tourism and hydroelectric sectors. Members have been arrested in multiple operations, including 'Naos' in 2008.

descriptions: Alvaro co-owned the Cafè de Paris with Palamara.
edges.evidence_quote: il noto locale romano "Cafè de Paris è di proprietà di Damiano Villari e che è stato acquistato in parte anche dall'imprenditore perugino Stefano Todini per conto delle cosche Palamara e Alvaro

descriptions: The Bruzzaniti are allied with the Palamara.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Morabito , dei Palamara e dei Crisafulli .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Palamara.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Palamara.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: Palestinian Liberation Front merged into PFLP.
edges.evidence_quote: Included within the discussions, as well as the ANM (including the RYO), were Heroes of Return (officially a collaboration with the PLO but actually under ANM control), Ahmed Jibril's Syria-based Palestinian Liberation Front, and a group of Jordanian Nasserists led by the former army officer Ahmed Za'rur. These groups combined to form the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine (PFLP).

Hai San Secret Society.description: A Penang-based Chinese secret society established around 1820, originating from Southern China. It was involved in bribery, conspiracy, extortion, and mercenary activities, and played a prominent role in the Larut Wars of 1862–1873. The society was predominantly Hakka and rivaled the Ghee Hin Society. It was dissolved around 1890.

descriptions: Ghee Hin frequently engaged in violent conflict with Hai San.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ghee Hin often fought against the Hakka -dominated Hai San secret society .

descriptions: Hai San and Ghee Hin were rivals, fighting in the Larut Wars and over tin fields.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghee Hin Society

descriptions: Hai San was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hai San society was allied with the Penang-based Tokong or Tua Peh Kong society

descriptions: Hai San absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
edges.evidence_quote: Bolton et al. suggest that the Hai San society ... by around 1854 had absorbed the Wah Sang society

descriptions: The Strangio had an alliance with Sardinian criminal groups for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Dall'indagine Santa Barbara del 2005 si è scoperta un'alleanza fra i Nirta e la criminalità sarda di Cagliari, Nuoro e Oristano per il traffico di cocaina ed eroina.

descriptions: Piromalli cooperated with Camorra clans Zaza, Galasso, and Ammaturo in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: dei clan camorristici Zaza , Galasso , Ammaturo

Inagawa-kai.description: The Inagawa-kai is the third largest yakuza group in Japan, based in the Kantō region. Founded in 1949 by Kakuji Inagawa in Atami, Shizuoka, it originated from traditional gamblers and engages in illegal gambling, drug trafficking, extortion, and prostitution. It was one of the first yakuza organizations to operate overseas and has provided disaster relief. As of 2025, it is led by Kazuya Uchibori.

descriptions: Inagawa-kai's founder headed the Kanto-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1960s, he headed the short-lived Kanto-kai, a federation of Kantō region gangs organized by Yoshio Kodama.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi as a rival of Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Inagawa-kai is a principal clan of the Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable members: Principal clans: Yamaguchi-gumi , Sumiyoshi-kai , Inagawa-kai

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi as an ally of Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Inagawa-kai is part of the Kanto-Hatsukakai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: a federation of Tokyo-based yakuza groups including the Inagawa-kai and the Sumiyoshi-kai

descriptions: Matsuba-kai and Inagawa-kai are both members of the Kantō Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Matsuba-kai is a member of a yakuza fraternal federation named the Kantō Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kantō -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Toa-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Snakeheads are allied with Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Cosa Nostra ( Italy ) , Inagawa-kai ( Japan )

descriptions: Soai-kai and Inagawa-kai are both dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Headquartered in Ichihara, Chiba , the Soai-kai is one of the three dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture , along with the Sumiyoshi-kai and the Inagawa-kai .

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai and Inagawa-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: In recent years, the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama, the wakagashira (second-in-command) of the Yamaguchi-gumi, Shuji Ogawa, the kaichō (chairman) of the Sumiyoshi-kai, and Kazuya Uchibori, the kaichō of the Inagawa-kai, held a social gathering.

descriptions: Suzuki-gumi is an affiliate of the Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: the Suzuki-gumi, an Inagawa affiliate

descriptions: Toa-kai and Inagawa-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi and Inagawa-kai formed an alliance in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: Taoka forged an alliance between the Yamaguchi-gumi and the Inagawa-kai at a sakazuki ceremony at his home.

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi and Inagawa-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: In recent years, the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama, the wakagashira (second-in-command) of the Yamaguchi-gumi, Shuji Ogawa, the kaichō (chairman) of the Sumiyoshi-kai, and Kazuya Uchibori, the kaichō of the Inagawa-kai, held a social gathering.

descriptions: Inagawa-kai is listed as an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

Nutty Blocc Compton Crips.description: The Nutty Blocc Compton Crips are a set of the Crips gang alliance based in Compton, California. They are one of the larger Crip sets in Compton and have been involved in gang conflicts, notably with the ATF alliance in 1995. Several influential rappers, including B.G. Knocc Out and Gangsta Dresta, have been associated with the gang. The gang remains active.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Acacia Blocc Compton Crips , Farm Dog Compton Crips , Spook Town Compton Crips

edges.evidence_quote: including a beheading of someone from La Mayiza (a faction of the Sinaloa Cartel) in 2026.

descriptions: Los Chapitos and La Mayiza are in internal conflict for control of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Los Chapitos y La Mayiza están en guerra abierta desde 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: La ruptura abierta ocurrió en 2024, cuando estalló una violenta confrontación en el bastión histórico del cartel.

descriptions: Los Chapitos y La Mayiza están en guerra desde septiembre de 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: el 9 de septiembre de 2024 se desataron enfrentamientos armados en Culiacán y otros municipios, marcando el inicio formal de la guerra entre Los Chapitos y la facción de El Mayo.

descriptions: La Mayiza is a faction of the Sinaloa Cartel currently in internal conflict with Los Chapitos.

descriptions: La Mayiza is a faction within Sinaloa, currently in dispute with Los Chapitos.

descriptions: SSA-S was established by Yawd Serk from SURA soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Lieutenant General Yawd Serk of the Shan United Revolutionary Army (SURA) led 800 soldiers under his command to central Shan State and established the Shan State Army – South (SSA-S) on 26 January 1996
